questions.question: When is the ‘International Day of Human Fraternity’ observed?
questions.explanation: The United Nations General Assembly proclaimed 4 February as the International Day of Human Fraternity in 2020. It celebrates the values of compassion, religious understanding, and mutual respect. On the occasion, the UN chief called for renewed commitment to form an ‘alliance of peace’ amid a surge in hate speech, sectarianism and strife.

questions.question: ‘Yaya Tso’ is a bio-diversity site located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Yaya Tso has been recently proposed as Ladakh’s first biodiversity heritage site (BHS) under the Biological Diversity Act.. It is also known as birds’ paradise for its beautiful lake located at an altitude of 4,820 metres. Yaya Tso is a nesting habitat for bar-headed goose, black-necked crane and brahminy duck and it it also has the distinction of being one of the highest breeding sites of the black-necked crane in India.

questions.question: ‘Gaziantep Castle’, which was seen in the news, is a historical site located in which country?
questions.explanation: The earthquake that struck Turkey and Syria has badly damaged Gaziantep Castle, a historic site and tourist attraction in south-eastern Turkey. The castle collapsed during the 7.8 magnitude earthquake which hit Turkey. According to archaeological excavations, the castle was first built as a watchtower in the Roman period in the second and third centuries C.E. and expanded over time. Most recently, it served as ‘Gaziantep Defense and Heroism Panoramic Museum’.

questions.question: Which Union Ministry launched the Mission Antyodaya Survey (MAS) 2022-23?
questions.explanation: Union Rural Development Minister Giriraj Singh recently inaugurated Mission Antyodaya Survey (MAS) 2022-23. The objectives of the scheme are- conducting an annual survey at the Gram Panchayat level to monitor the progress in the development process in rural areas, Panchayat wise ranking and making Gap report, which serves as an important input for the Gram Panchayat Development Plan (GPDP).

questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution deals with the appointment of Governors for each state in India?
questions.explanation: Article 153 of the Indian Constitution deals with the appointment of Governors for each state in India. President of India Droupadi Murmu appointed governors in 12 states and a Union Territory while accepting the resignation of two. Jharkhand governor Ramesh Bais is now Governor of Maharashtra and Arunachal Pradesh governor B D Mishra has been appointed as L-G of Ladakh.

questions.question: What is the name of the exercise between National Security Guard (NSG) and US Special Operations Forces (SOF)?
questions.explanation: The TARKASH exercise is a joint bilateral exercise between India’s National Security Guard (NSG) and US Special Operations Forces (SOF). The sixth edition of this exercise is being held in Chennai from January 16 to February 14. This is the first time that the ‘Chemical, Biological, Radiological and Nuclear (CBRN) terror response’ is included in TARKASH.

questions.question: ISRO commenced the training for crew module recovery for its Gaganyaan Mission, along with which Armed Force?
questions.explanation: Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO), along with the Navy, started training for crew module recovery when it splashes down in the sea after re-entering the atmosphere. This training was done as a part of preparation for its first human spaceflight (Gaganyaan). The training aims to finalise the standard operating procedure for the recovery of the crew members as soon as possible. The trials commenced at the water survival test facility of the Navy in Kochi.

questions.question: Which company launched India’s First drone air traffic management system?
questions.explanation: Skye Air, a Gurugram-based drone solutions provider, launched traffic management system for drones in India. The software was launched in the presence of Minister of Road Transport and Highways of India Nitin Gadkari. It will allow drone operators to plan routes, make flight plans and assess risks before running drone-based operations in the country.

questions.question: As per the annual report of International Energy Agency, which region will use half of world’s electricity by 2025?
questions.explanation: According to a new forecast released by the International Energy Agency, Asia will use half of the world’s electricity by 2025, for the first time. As per the annual report, China will be consuming more electricity than the European Union, United States and India combined. Africa, which is home to almost a fifth of world’s nearly 8 billion inhabitants, will account for just 3% of global electricity consumption in 2025.

questions.question: Which is the first Fintech company to support RuPay Credit Cards on UPI?
questions.explanation: MobiKwik has become the first fintech app to support RuPay Credit Cards on UPI. The facility will help millions of customers who use UPI for their daily transactions. With RuPay Credit Cards now linked directly to UPI IDs, customers can easily make payments to merchants by scanning the UPI QR code and using UPI PIN for payment authentication.
